languages.text: "Благословенны те, кто прислушивается к зову Омниссии! Буду рад нашей беседе, Вольный Торговец".
"Blessed are those who heed the call of the Omnissiah! I look forward to our conversation, Rogue Trader."
languages.original_text: "Благословенны те, кто прислушивается к зову Омниссии! Буду рад нашей беседе, Вольный Торговец".

traits.locale_text: "Blessed are those who heed the call of the Omnissiah! I look forward to our conversation, Rogue Trader."
"Blessed are those who heed the call of the Omnissiah! I look forward to our conversation, Rogue Trader."
"Blessed are those who heed the call of the Omnissiah! I look forward to our conversation, Rogue Trader."
"Blessed are those who heed the call of the Omnissiah! I look forward to our conversation, Rogue Trader."

languages.text: « Bénis soient ceux qui répondent à l'appel de l'Omnimessie ! J'ai hâte de discuter à nouveau avec vous, {mf|libre-marchand|libre-marchande}. »
languages.original_text: "Blessed are those who heed the call of the Omnissiah! I look forward to our conversation, Rogue Trader."

traits.locale_text: « Bénis soient ceux qui répondent à l'appel de l'Omnimessie ! J'ai hâte de discuter à nouveau avec vous, {mf|libre-marchand|libre-marchande}. »

languages.text: «¡Benditos los que acuden a la llamada del Omnissiah! Espero con interés nuestra conversación, Comerciante Independiente».
languages.original_text: "Blessed are those who heed the call of the Omnissiah! I look forward to our conversation, Rogue Trader."

traits.locale_text: «¡Benditos los que acuden a la llamada del Omnissiah! Espero con interés nuestra conversación, Comerciante Independiente».

languages.text: “凡聆听欧姆尼赛亚之召唤者，皆为蒙福之人！行商浪人，我期待与您进行交谈。”
languages.original_text: "Blessed are those who heed the call of the Omnissiah! I look forward to our conversation, Rogue Trader."

traits.locale_text: “凡聆听欧姆尼赛亚之召唤者，皆为蒙福之人！行商浪人，我期待与您进行交谈。”

languages.text: "Gesegnet sind jene, die dem Ruf des Omnissiah folgen! Ich freue mich auf unser Gespräch, {mf|Freihändler|Freihändlerin}."
languages.original_text: "Blessed are those who heed the call of the Omnissiah! I look forward to our conversation, Rogue Trader."

traits.locale_text: "Gesegnet sind jene, die dem Ruf des Omnissiah folgen! Ich freue mich auf unser Gespräch, {mf|Freihändler|Freihändlerin}."

languages.text: "Hermesih'in çağrısına kulak verenler ne kutsaldır! Yüz yüze konuşmayı dört gözle bekliyorum Hür Tacir."
languages.original_text: "Blessed are those who heed the call of the Omnissiah! I look forward to our conversation, Rogue Trader."

traits.locale_text: "Hermesih'in çağrısına kulak verenler ne kutsaldır! Yüz yüze konuşmayı dört gözle bekliyorum Hür Tacir."

languages.text: 「お話しできるのを楽しみにしております、艦長様」
languages.original_text: "I look forward to our conversation, Lord Captain."
